problem id: ea0deb13
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11111001 -> 01011100
  00010010 -> 01001001
  00110110 -> 11011011
  00110011 -> 01111001
  10100111 -> 10110011
  00001011 -> 01100101
  10011001 -> 01101100
  01000011 -> 01000001

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 01110100
